title: Soap Box, Soap Dish, Soap Dishes for Bathroom, Plastic Draining Soap Dishe, Plastic Draining Soap Dishes, Keep Soap Dry, for Shower Bathroom Kitchen Easy Cleaning (White)
features: 【Drain Design】The striped design, with a small drain hole at the bottom, it can automatically drain without water accumulation, can keep the soap dry and clean, and reduce the growth of bacteria.
【Unique Design】With Lid: When you need to take a bar on holiday or to the gym. our soap box allows you to transport used, wet soap with ease. It is water tight and very secure once closed.

【Simple and advanced】The overall design of the soap container is simple and generous, not cumbersome. White and gray give people a minimalist and advanced feeling. It matches most bathroom decor styles and is a good choice.
【Material】The soap dish made of high quality plastic material,strong and durable,easy to clean and dry,can be used for a long time.
【Versatile】Soap dish can hold soap, sponge, dish brush, shaver, etc.
description: Product Description The Soap Box we offer is designed with a two-piece structure that allows water to drip down into the base below. Ensuring that your soap can dry completely. Our kitchen soap dishes are designed to be flexible with high sides, high ridges, and a non-slip waterproof bottom. The tray doubles as a bathroom accessory, perfect for storing beauty accessories or jewelry. Our Soap Box not easy to aging, not easy to fade, long service life Smooth and bright appearance Durable ABS plastic. Multi-purpose: In addition to being used as a soap drying rack, this soap box can also be used as a drying rack for kitchen dishwashing brushes, steel balls, scouring pads, and dishwashing sponges. Say goodbye to constantly searching for misplaced items and hello to perfectly organized soap, solid shampoo, and solid conditioner. This soap holder will not only keep your products in their place but also prevent your handmade soaps from getting soggy and water-logged, ensuring they last longer.
